# <Workstream Title>

Status: `<active-draft | closed | abandoned>`.
Branch: `<branch>`.
PR: `<url or none>`.
Commit: `<sha or see git history>`.
DRA: `<agent/person>`.
Dates: `<opened> -> <closed or active>`.

This report is informative continuity for the workstream. It is not architecture
authority, product authority, or live kanban unless the owning process
explicitly says otherwise.

Committed reports SHOULD be closed or abandoned snapshots. Active drafts may
exist inside an implementation branch while the workstream is running.
